programs.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programs.desc: Sarah's gone viral, and rumours about a famous footballer put everyone under pressure. Contains some strong language.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Tearing around the stalls of a bustling antiques fair in Exeter are two teams of parents and their daughters. Can experts Ben Cooper and Gary Pe help to keep the peace.

programs.desc: Garden experts Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein are joined by guest judge and passionate gardener Dame Prue Leith as they visit three stunning gardens.

programs.title: See Hear: Travel Uncovered
programs.desc: 2/16. A look at travel in the deaf community, with tips for deaf travellers, solo adventures around the world and stories of confidence, independence and discovery.
